data.description: US TWO-YEAR FRNS DISCOUNT MARGIN AT 0.103%

data.title: Appian Celebrates 2026 Innovation Award Winners
data.description: Appian, a renowned leader in the AI-driven process automation industry, proudly recognized its customers who have successfully leveraged AI technology to achieve tangible benefits. The prestigious North American 2026 Innovation Awards, held during the Appian World conference in Orlando, Florida on April 28, 2026, showcased the exceptional accomplishments of these winners. Appian, listed on Nasdaq as APPN, celebrated the innovative strategies and real-world outcomes achieved by these honorees at the event.

data.title: Creo Debuts AI Solution for Real-Time Creator Content Editing, Reducing Costs and Time-to-Market While Ensuring Brand Compliance at Scale
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 28, 2026, Omnicom Media's influencer marketing arm introduced a new tool that utilizes Google's sophisticated models, including GeminiVeo and Nano Banana. This tool enhances Creo's existing AI-powered suite of creator discovery, briefing, and vetting tools by incorporating post-production editing capabilities. This innovation aims to streamline and improve the influencer marketing process.

data.title: Bridgestone announces executive leadership changes
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 28, 2026, Bridgestone revealed the appointment of Robert Johnson as the Group President for North America and Wade Sempkowski as the Chief Financial Officer for the West region, which covers the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. These two key leadership positions are crucial for the company's operations in this vast region. This move signals Bridgestone's strategic focus on enhancing its presence and performance in North America specifically. The appointment of Johnson and Sempkowski showcases Bridgestone's commitment to strengthening its leadership team in order to drive growth and success throughout the West region.

data.title: Pivot Bio Expands St. Louis Footprint with New Centers of Excellence for Crop Nutrition Innovation and Manufacturing
data.description: In Hazelwood, Missouri, ag tech company Pivot Bio is expanding its presence with two new Centers of Excellence in Hazelwood and Creve Coeur, investing over $7 million. This move comes amidst unstable fertilizer markets due to global supply challenges, energy fluctuations, and geopolitical unrest. The expansion aims to bolster manufacturing and innovation capabilities in the Greater St. Louis area in response to these market dynamics.

data.title: Origami Risk’s P&C Platform Selected by Gramercy Risk Management
data.description: In Chicago, Origami Risk, a prominent SaaS technology firm for risk, safety, and insurance, disclosed that Gramercy Risk Management chose its cloud-native SaaS P&C platform to aid its ongoing expansion. Gramercy, specializing in niche insurance markets, will integrate Origami Risk’s full suite encompassing policy, billing, and claims. This move aims to streamline core operations and bolster its current operations.

data.title: Update on Company’s 3-for-1 Stock Split
data.description: Qualstar Corporation, a reputable company based in Camarillo, California, announced an update on the review and clearance of its 3-for-1 forward stock split by FINRA. The company, traded as OTC: QBAK, specializes in scalable data storage and high-efficiency power solutions. This update comes after their prior announcement regarding the stock split.
PETROBRAS INTENDS TO INCREASE GAS PRICES IF TAX CUTS ARE PASSED, REPORTS FOLHA.

data.title: OneVest opens the Agentic Wealth OS with MCP for real-time AI data access and agentic action
data.description: On April 28 in New York, the OneVest MCP Server was introduced as a game-changer for RIAs, banks, and broker-dealers. This innovative server provides secure, real-time AI access to live data, portfolio positions, and pipeline activity. It enhances the potential of AI tools when seamlessly integrated within a wealth management ecosystem. This development signifies a significant advancement in the financial industry, offering unprecedented levels of efficiency and effectiveness.

data.title: Vontier to showcase technologies that give fleets total control across every site, vehicle and energy type at ACT Expo 2026
data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - Vontier (NYSE: VNT) is set to participate in ACT Expo 2026 (May 4–7, Las Vegas) emphasizing the importance for commercial fleets to prioritize balancing cost, efficiency, and reliability. With a focus on a unified, multi-energy platform designed for control, resilience, and operational clarity, the company will showcase its offerings at Booth #2237. Vontier will unite ANGI Energy, Gasboy, Driivz, and Teletrac Navman to exhibit the capabilities of integrated hardware, software, insights, and services for the industry.

data.title: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CDNL) disclosed plans to release its financial figures for Q1 2026 prior to market opening on Tuesday, May 12. Following this announcement, the Company is set to conduct a conference call on the same day to discuss these results.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- OneVest Technologies Inc./
data.description: OneVest Technologies Inc. has announced the integration of MCP into the Agentic Wealth OS for real-time AI client insights. A revised version of the news release was issued on 28-Apr-2026 due to an initial error in the previous distribution. The enhanced software now offers advanced capabilities for analyzing sensitive client data, ensuring efficient decision-making processes. This initiative aims to utilize cutting-edge technology to provide unparalleled financial services.

data.title: Galaxy Digital's Q1 loss of $216 million offset by gains from Hyperliquid, CEO Novogratz confirms.
data.description: Galaxy Digital's CEO Mike Novogratz reported that the company's balance sheet was impacted negatively due to the decrease in cryptocurrency prices. However, the losses were partially offset by Hyperliquid, a subsidiary of Galaxy Digital. The exact figures regarding the extent of the losses and the offset were not provided, but it was emphasized that the decline in crypto prices had a notable effect on the company's financial standing.
King Charles and Donald Trump enter the White House, begin closed bilateral meeting

data.title: Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM) Files Seven Provisional Patents Positioning Restore.Earth as the Physical Truth Layer Beneath the AI Economy
data.description: In Astatula, Fla., on April 28, 2026, Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM) revealed the submission of seven fresh U.S. provisional patent applications — P-170 to P-176 — elevating its total co-pending portfolio to 176 applications. These submissions mark the conclusion of the intelligence and compute aspects of Restore.Earth™, the firm’s GPS-validated, AI-certified real-world platform driven by SGTM technology.

data.title: Sandvik's Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Sandvik AB convened its Annual General Meeting in Sandviken, Sweden. Stefan Widing, the President and CEO of Sandvik, addressed attendees, discussing the company's operations and financial results for the previous year, 2025. Emphasizing the key points of their performance in 2025, a year marked by notable challenges, Widing provided insights on the company's achievements and strategic direction.

data.title: Kennedy Funding Closes Land Loan in Banning, California
data.description: In Englewood, N.J., a direct lender is offering a 9% rate on a loan for a future residential development project on a 14-acre land. Steve Rogovich, the senior loan officer at Kennedy Funding, recently facilitated a land refinance deal crucial for initiating this development.

data.title: New analysis shows U.S. homeless numbers have flattened after years of sharp increases
data.description: Preliminary data for the year 2025 suggests a potential turning point in the issue of homelessness, with the number of homeless veterans reaching the lowest level ever recorded. According to a recent analysis by Community Solutions, the trend of increasing homelessness in the United States appears to be stabilizing. This development is significant as it marks a positive shift in addressing homelessness, indicating progress in combating this societal challenge.
